name: Cloud Services for Energy Utilities
positioning: KRITIS-compliant cloud transformation in tiered engagements

tiers.name: Foundation
tiers.scope: Single regulated workload domain with BSI C5 readiness plus up to 50 workloads migrated, 14 weeks parallel delivery.
exclusions: Application refactoring or modernization beyond lift-and-shift

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.scope: Adds single-site OT/IT hybrid deployment with air-gap SCADA architecture on top of multi-domain sovereign cloud and 200-workload SAP IS-U migration, 20 weeks with parallel execution.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.scope: Adds dual-hyperscaler managed operations (up to 300 instances, 24/7 SLA) and enterprise-wide OT integration on top of full-estate 500+ workload migration with BaFin audit support, 30 weeks with parallel workstreams (project: EUR 1,100,000 one-time; managed operations onboarding: EUR 195,000 recurring-transition).
exclusions: On-site travel and expenses beyond 10 days
Custom integrations beyond standard API connectors
Third hyperscaler onboarding (GCP) beyond AWS and Azure
